title: [ARCHIVED] Endgame Reborn
description: A vanilla-style endgame expansion and rework mod, focused around a new, post-netherite tool tier with a variety of balanced, vanilla-style and modded-friendly upgrade paths.
body:
[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/7vJUhps4dt) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459) 

### IMPORTANT NOTICE

### Endgame Reborn has been archived and succeeded by [End Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-reborn) and [End Reborn Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-reborn-additions)

### Please install [End Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/end-reborn) instead and be sure to install the [UPGRADE COMPAT](https://modrinth.com/mod/endgame-reborn/version/2) Endgame Reborn version alongside it to avoid breaking existing worlds.

### Provided you install the upgrade mod version, none of your progress will be affected. Thanks for all the support, and I hope you enjoy the new End Reborn!

-------------------------------------------------------

Expand and enhance your early and mid-game progression too, with [Progression Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/progression-reborn)

Endgame Reborn is a massive gear expansion mod focused on expanding the endgame of vanilla Minecraft, in addition to making some subtle improvements to the End.

The mod is centred around a new endgame ore, Remnant Steel, found rarely in the End much like with Ancient Debris. This new material can be combined into 7 different varieties of ingots to make one of the 7 new sets of gear. While each set is unique in its own way, all sets have the same defence, attack and speed values to encourage variety and give player choice, rather than forcing you down a linear path. The sets are listed below, and images are viewable in the image gallery. 

In addition, diamond and netherite vanilla gear is removed and replaced, with extremely similar, but slightly rebalanced versions to better fit this mod, including a slight armor toughness reduction and the ability to repair netherite gear with netherite scrap. [A compatibility datapack to revert these recipe overrides for use with other armor/weapon mods can be found here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/endgame-reborn-compat), which is especially useful for larger modpacks, though an alternative solution would be to add support for Endgame Reborn's custom variants using a datapack yourself.

Use Farmer’s Delight? [Get the Endgame Reborn Knives addon mod here](https://modrinth.com/mod/endgame-reborn-knives) to add Farmer’s Delight knife variants for each gear set in Endgame Reborn.

All steel armor has a total defence score of 20 and armor toughness of 3

All steel tools have 1 higher damage than netherite (excl. hoes) and an efficiency rating of 10

### 1.20+ Features ([view 1.19 here](https://github.com/Rebel459/endgame-reborn-1.19/tree/main))

Note that to upgrade/sidegrade Steel to its variations in the smithing table, you will need the respective template + a certain item (eg an ingot), depending on what you want to forge your Steel gear into. While the main Remnant Steel template can be found in End Cities, the others can be crafted manually using a special recipe, as well as duplicated once you’ve acquired your first copy. In addition, the Netherite Upgrade Template can also be crafted without needing to be found to retain consistency, using a more expensive custom recipe. Recipes can be viewed in JEI or REI, and advancements have been added so that you will automatically unlock all recipes through the vanilla recipe book as you play the game.

End Additions

- End Stone tools

- Popped Chorus tools

- Chorus Spine and Chorus Clusters to craft sticks and crafting tables respectively

- End Soil and Remnant End Stone spawn in blobs throughout the End

- Remnant Steel Ore generates rarely in the end

- Remnant Steel Scrap is found rarely in End City Chests

- Remnant Steel Upgrade Smithing Templates are found in End City Chests

Steel Gear

- the base variant of steel, it’s as powerful as the others and intended to be the main “final” gear in the game. Variants beyond this provide optional gameplay variety and cosmetic variation

- requires remnant steel scrap and iron ingots to craft

- items have fire/lava immunity and armor has knockback resistance, like netherite

- repaired with remnant steel scrap or steel ingots

- note that all Steel Gear can be repaired with Steel Ingots from 1.20 onwards

Reinforced Steel Gear

- tough and reliable

- crafted with remnant steel and diamonds

- has much higher durability

- repaired with diamonds

Gilded Steel Gear

- well-suited for fiery environments

- crafted using remnant steel scrap and gold ingots

- doesn’t burn in lava

- has slightly increased durability

- repaired with netherite (scrap/ingot)

Forgotten Steel Gear

- durable and resistant

- crafted using remnant steel scrap and shulker shells

- armor has knockback resistance, like netherite

- tools have much higher durability

- repaired with shulker shells

Fractured Steel Gear

- well-suited for enchanting, crafted and renewed using amethyst shards

- crafted using remnant steel scrap and amethyst shards

- has a much higher enchantability rating (25, like gold)

- repaired with amethyst shards

Sculk Steel Gear

- powerful, sturdy gear acquired using the rare resources of ancient cities

- crafted using remnant steel scrap and echo shards

- highly durable armor with equivalent durability to Forgotten Steel

- tools have a high chance to extract a small amount of XP from blocks and mobs when used

- repaired with echo shards

Prosperous Steel Gear

- forged using flawless emeralds acquired by mining emerald ore, you shall prosper with this toolset

- crafted using remnant steel scrap and flawless emeralds

- armor has an increased enchantability score of 20

- tools give a low chance for blocks/mobs to drop an emerald when used

- repaired with bottles of enchanting or emerald blocks

### Host your own Server

If you're interested in playing Minecraft (with or without my mods) with your friends, I recommend you **[take a look at Kinetic Hosting!](https://billing.kinetichosting.net/aff.php?aff=55)**.
